name: Asparagus with Sesame Citrus Sauce
recipeInstructions:
- Prepare the asparagus. Snap off the bases of the spears and discard them. Cut into 1-inch pieces. Bring a small amount of salted water to boil in a saucepan; add asparagus and cook for 6 to 8 minutes, or until crisp-tender. (Micro-zap for about 5 minutes.) Stop cooking by rinsing in cold water and draining. Set aside.
- Prepare the sauce by pre-measuring all ingredients and having them ready. Melt butter in a saucepan. Add sesame seeds and cook, stirring for 2 to 3 minutes over moderate heat until they are browned. Add lemon juice, orange juice, then oil, in that order, stirring. Taste and salt only if the mixture is too bitter.
- Add the asparagus to the sauce and toss until evenly coated. Heat through before serving hot.
